heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly clear, increasing cloud cover overnight, with a chance of rain showers in the Adirondacks and Western Greens after midnight. Lows in the 30s, near 40 along Lake Champlain. Light and variable wind.

heading: Monday
text: Scattered rain showers north of Route 2. Partly sunny southeast, then sunshine spreading north in the afternoon. Highs in the 60s, with a few 50s sticking around in the northeast. Southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 25 mph.

heading: Monday Night
text: Mostly cloudy north, partly clear south. Increasing clouds after midnight. Milder. Lows in the 40s, near 50 along Lake Champlain. South winds becoming breezy, around 10 mph, strongest in the Champlain Valley
